creator: tobez@FreeBSD.org
text:
This update is required for updating www/p5-CatalystX-Component-Traits
to the most recent version, which in turn is required to update
www/p5-Catalyst-Model-DBIC-Schema to its most recent version, which is
what I am ultimately trying to accomplish here.

Apart from version number bump, the patch also rearranges the
dependencies in the order it is listen in the original Makefile.PL, for
easier tracking, as well as gets rid of one unneeded and one test
dependency.
